task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Troubleshooting PRISMAsync Remote control (for Mobile alerting) via ORS

abstract.p: This topic describes the fault analysis for the PRISMAsync Cloud Services.
The Cloud services consist of the following user applications:

prereq.p: A prerequisite for the correct operation of the cloud services applications is that Remote Service (ORS) is enabled and functional on the applicable host machines.
Please make sure ORS is enabled on the system before you start troubleshooting the cloud services applications.

note.p: To troubleshoot the PRISMAsync Cloud Services, a valid Remote Service account is required.

section.title: Troubleshooting PRISMAsync Cloud Services via ORS (On Remote Service)
section.p: On Remote Service (ORS) application provides an overview of the Cloud Services and their current status.
The ORS application is available via http://service.cpp.canon.
After having selected the product, Select [Remote data]→[Cloud services] to view the detailed status information of the Remote Control.
The status section provides information regarding the connection between the printer and the Cloud Services.

entry.p: Remote control is enabled on the printer & registered in the cloud.
Remote control is enabled on the printer & not registered in the cloud.
Remote control is enabled on the printer & removed in the cloud.
No communication between ORS and the cloud possible.

note.p: The disconnected status is automatically detected and corrected. Wait until the connection is restored.

entry.p: No valid data transferred from the printer to the cloud.

section.p: The following tab can be selected to provide additional information:

note.p: Additional information regarding Océ Remote Service (e.g user manual) is available in the [Docs & Tools] section in the ORS application.

section.p: The status of the printers between the Remote Service Dashboard and the Cloud Services admin site is synchronised after a remote service connect message is received.
A remote service connect message is send:

li.p: After a reboot of the PRISMAsync print server
When a remote connection test via the control panel is executed
16 hours after the last connect message a new connect message is send automatically.

section.p: To test the infrastructure the following tests can be executed:

li.p: Test the remote connection via the control panel
Send a test (push) notification from the Cloud Service admin site to the mobile device
Prerequisites: notifications must be enabled and not muted, and the Remote Control app must be running but not opened on the mobile device.
Test the Remote Control app via the Settings Editor.
